generatedBy: rork-agent Expo build 18 — startup black screen / infinite loading fix
matchDetail: Expo source is at e3149d5. Render live backend reports 0b37191f. GitHub token expired so new commits are not synced to GitHub/Render.

apk.buildMethod: expo prebuild --clean + gradlew assembleRelease (local, Watchman disabled)
apk.embeddedStartupFix: preventAutoHideAsync + hideAsync + startup timeout + initAuth withTimeout confirmed in bundle

startupAudit.rootCause1: No SplashScreen control. expo-splash-screen was installed but never imported or called. On Android, the native splash auto-hides before React renders, producing a black screen between native splash dismissal and first JS paint.
startupAudit.rootCause2: initAuth() had no timeout. supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' }) at line 1485 does async AsyncStorage operations. If AsyncStorage is slow (large session payloads on Android), isLoading stays true forever. The constant AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS=3500 existed at line 39 but was never used.
startupAudit.rootCause3: No loading timeout in TabsLayout. The isLoading spinner at line 51-57 showed indefinitely if isLoading never resolved. No safety net to force the auth guard to proceed after 5 seconds.
startupAudit.fix1: Added SplashScreen.preventAutoHideAsync() at module load + SplashScreen.hideAsync() in useEffect after first render. This coordinates splash dismissal with React's first paint, eliminating the black screen gap.
startupAudit.fix2: Wrapped initAuth's signOut in withTimeout(AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS, ...) so that if AsyncStorage is slow, isLoading is still set to false within 3.5 seconds. The finally block always runs setIsLoading(false).
startupAudit.fix3: Added 5-second loadingTimedOut safety net in TabsLayout. If isLoading stays true for more than 5 seconds, loadingTimedOut becomes true, effectiveLoading becomes false, and the auth guard proceeds to redirect to /login.
startupAudit.fix3Lines: 32-42 (loadingTimedOut state + useEffect timeout), 44 (effectiveLoading), 55-64 (auth guard uses effectiveLoading), 66-72 (spinner shows while effectiveLoading)
startupAudit.fix4: Added startup timeout error screen in RootLayout. If the app hasn't fully rendered within 5 seconds (STARTUP_TIMEOUT_MS), a visible error screen with a Retry button is shown instead of a black screen.
startupAudit.fix5: Wrapped injectWebKeyboardCSS in try/catch. Previously an uncaught exception here could crash the root useEffect before SplashScreen.hideAsync() ran.

expoApp.detail: Expo app at expo/ is the only approved app. Android package com.ivxholdings.app, version 1.4.3, versionCode 18, 240 routes.

gradleBuild.detail: BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 4s, 397 actionable tasks, 57 executed, 11 from cache, 329 up-to-date.

easBuild.detail: EAS CLI requires an Expo user account. EXPO_TOKEN is not set in the sandbox. APK was built locally instead.

github.detail: GitHub token expired (HTTP 401). GitHub repo has commit 0b37191f. New commits exist only on the Rork git router.

litterbox.detail: litterbox.catbox.moe returned HTTP 500 Internal Server Error. APK uploaded to gofile.io instead.

fixesApplied: BUILD 18 FIX: Added SplashScreen.preventAutoHideAsync() + hideAsync() to coordinate native splash dismissal with React's first paint — eliminates black screen on Android.
BUILD 18 FIX: Wrapped initAuth signOut in withTimeout(AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS=3500) — prevents infinite loading if AsyncStorage is slow.
BUILD 18 FIX: Added 5-second loadingTimedOut safety net in TabsLayout — forces auth guard to proceed if isLoading never resolves.
BUILD 18 FIX: Added startup timeout error screen in RootLayout — shows visible Retry screen instead of black screen after 5 seconds.
BUILD 18 FIX: Wrapped injectWebKeyboardCSS in try/catch — prevents uncaught exception from blocking startup.
BUILD 17 FIX: Added router-level auth guard in app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx — redirects to /login when unauthenticated.
BUILD 16 FIX: initAuth() calls supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' }) on cold launch — clears persisted Supabase session.
BUILD 16 FIX: onAuthStateChange gated by manualOwnerLoginRef — ignores all session events unless manual login set the flag.
BUILD 16 FIX: manualOwnerLoginRef set unconditionally in login(), loginOwnerPasswordless(), verify2FA().
BUILD 14 FIX: Diagnostics banner visible prop bound to state, defaults false.
BUILD 14 FIX: runtime-environment.ts classifies bare-workflow release APK as standalone/production.
BUILD 14 FIX: build-info.ts reads from Constants.expoConfig.extra.
remainingWork: Install build 18 APK on real device and verify: no black screen on cold launch, splash screen transitions smoothly to first screen, owner login screen appears within 5 seconds, no infinite spinner, manual login works, startup error screen appears if init fails (test with airplane mode).
blockers: EXPO_TOKEN / Expo account is not available in the sandbox; APK was built locally instead of via EAS.
GitHub token is expired, so the GitHub repo connected to Render cannot receive new commits.
litterbox.catbox.moe is experiencing a server-side outage (HTTP 500); APK uploaded to gofile.io as fallback.
Real-device testing cannot be done in sandbox — user must test installed APK on physical device.
